# NÈVE

## FOAM PREWASH - NEUTRAL

**NÈVE ** ** is a chemical prodigy**: a ** neutral foam shampoo ** with the power similar to an alkaline! **NÈVE ** is a concentrated mix of ** surfactants ** ** highly ** ** biodegradable ** free of phosphates formulated in such a way as to adhere to the surface for a long time, cleaning it thoroughly, ** softening ** the ** dirt ** and road contamination of all kinds. **NÈVE is safe on every surface**, even the most delicate gaskets and metal moldings.

![image](https://labocosmetica.com/en/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/elevato_potere_schiumogeno_icon_labocosmetica.svg)

High foaming power

![image](https://labocosmetica.com/en/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/lavaggio_sicuro_sulle_protezioni_icon_labocosmetica.svg)

Safe wash on protections

![image](https://labocosmetica.com/en/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/vda_a_icon_labocosmetica.svg)

VDA certification

Description

Data sheet

Description

**NÈVE** is a prodigy of chemistry: a neutral foam shampoo with power comparable to an alkaline one!

**NÈVE** is a concentrate of highly biodegradable surfactants without any phosphates, formulated in such a way as to adhere on the surface for a long time, cleansing it thoroughly, softening dirt and road contamination of any kind.

**NÈVE** is safe on any surface, even the most delicate trims and metal mouldings. Thanks to the significant presence in its formula of chelating agents of calcium carbonates,

**NÈVE** is able to maintain high performance even in hard water, decreasing the risk of leaving residues in the drying stage.

**NÈVE** is safe on applied protection, be it wax, sealants or nanotechnological coatings.

The refined composition of NÈVE, makes this shampoo safe even if used in sunlight.

*

* Play Video

How to use

**NÈVE ** it can be used in ** foam mode ** respecting the dilution output, ** in Nebula atomizer mode ** or in ** spray mode **. Dispense the product in the ** preferred way from bottom to top ** in a ** homogeneous ** way, then leave the product on for a few minutes until the foam dissolves, so as to perform the cleaning action and rinsing starting from the bottom upwards in a homogeneous way. In cases of more stubborn dirt it is advisable to use the product in spray mode so as to have more speed in the cleaning phase. ** Minimum dilution 1:25 ** – ** maximum 1:50 ** in ** spear ** ** foam **. Extremely concentrated product to be used with the recommended dilutions. Overdosing creates a heavy foam resulting in a loss of adhesion to the surface. Also **NÈVE **, like all ** #Labocosmetica products, is designed, formulated and manufactured in Italy. **

Instructions:

![image](https://www.labocosmetica.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/Neve_01.jpg)

Step 1

Dilute 1:25 to 1:50 depending on the contamination conditions and dispense evenly with a foam gun.

![image](https://www.labocosmetica.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/Neve_10.jpg)

Step 2

Wait 5 minutes.

![image](https://www.labocosmetica.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/neve-1.jpg)

Step 3

Rinse before the foam dries. * Use the wash mitt according to the level of contamination.

Results:

![image](https://www.labocosmetica.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/neve_diluizione_1.jpg)

![image](https://www.labocosmetica.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/neve_diluizione_2.jpg)

Dilution:

FOAM GUN

1:25 (minimum) – 1:50 (maximum)

STURDY DIRT (EXTERIOR)

1:5

MEDIUM DIRT (EXTERIOR)

1:10

NEBULA PUMP

1:20

Product details

## Car parts

Wrapping/matt, External, Car Body, Glass, Crystals

## Materials

Alluminium, Paint, Glass, PPF

## Type

Shampoo, Prewash

Warnings

![image](https://labocosmetica.com/en/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/pericolo_icona.final_1.png)

* ** P102 ** Keep out of the reach of children. *

* ** H319 ** Causes serious eye irritation. *

* ** P280 ** Wear eye protection / face protection. *

* ** P305 + P351 + P338 ** IN CASE OF EYE CONTACT: * * rinse thoroughly for several minutes. Remove any contact lenses if easy to do. Continue rinsing. *

* Contains 1,2-benzisothiazol-3 (2H) -one. May cause an allergic reaction. *

SCARICA

# NÈVE

## SAFE FOR WAX

NÈVE only removes dirt without damaging the existing wax layers. Snow-effect foam shampoo with the sweet scent of Italian peach that combines a decontamination capacity similar to that of an alkaline.

[

REQUEST INFORMATION 

REQUEST INFORMATION

![image](https://www.labocosmetica.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/NEVE_EN.jpg) 

![image](https://www.labocosmetica.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/NEVE_EN_2.jpg) 

## EXCELLENT!

### Excellent dilution ratio and excellent decontaminating power.

### High concentration 1000ml!

### Large capacity, environmentally friendly.

NEVE is a highly concentrated product that drips much more slowly than other products and is suitable for removing contaminants that have long been present on the paint surface.

![image](https://www.labocosmetica.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/NEVE_1600X768.png)
